scripts.build: npm run build -w @feynman/core && npm run build -w @feynman/react && npm run build -w @feynman/editor && npm run build -w @feynman/demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @feynman/core && npm run build -w @feynman/react && npm run build -w @feynman/editor && tsc -p tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run typecheck
